commentaries.author: Hippolytus of Rome
commentaries.content: For as they honoured God by giving themselves up to death, so, too, they were themselves honoured not only by God, but also by the king. And they taught strange and foreign nations also to worship God.

commentaries.author: Jerome
commentaries.content: Those commentators who say that the three youths were previously not judges set over the provinces but mere overseers of individual government agencies in Babylon, would have it that they were now appointed as judges over the provinces.

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
